Update log:

3.1: Add the KaoriosToolbox patch
3.0: Upgrade the app's experimental features.
2.9: Added some new features and fixed code and bugs.
2.8: The update mechanism has been revised; add-on patches for ROMs will now auto update if a new version is available.
2.7: Fixes the InstallPackageHelper.smali patch error
2.6: Repair the boot patch code
2.5: Added the ability to run application tests and fix errors
